# conversation-ui

Umbrella for visual primitives that render a `Conversation` in the UI. Each
sub-plugin under `plugins/` ships one visual building block (item rows/chips
today; cards, mentions, breadcrumbs in the future). Surfaces import the
specific primitive they need directly — the umbrella does not re-export.

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Umbrella for visual primitives that render a Conversation. Sub-plugins ship the actual components (item rows/chips, future cards/mentions/etc.).
- Sub-plugins:
  - **`item`** — Visual primitive for rendering a Conversation as a row or inline chip. Used by every surface that lists conversations.

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
